untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) directional bias determination not expressible via price/indicator comparison, (2) strike selection proximity logic (not available in backtest engine), (3) spread type selection logic (CALLS_ONLY restriction), (4) probability ITM thresholds (requires options pricing model), and (5) multiple THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameters that are undefined. The signal is primarily an options strategy framework rather than a technical entry/exit rule.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture trend confirmation (ADX_14 > 25) and IV compression (HVol_20 < 0.60 for below-percentile IV) as proxy conditions for directional bias establishment and low volatility environment. However, this signal fundamentally requires options-specific analysis (strike selection, spread structure, probability ITM) that cannot be expressed in a price-action backtest engine. Recommend manual review for options-specific backtesting.
